channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter leaves game against Kansas State with apparent shoulder injury
item.description: BOULDER, Colo. (AP) — Colorado two-way star Travis Hunter left the Buffaloes' 31-28 loss to No. 18 Kansas State late in the second quarter Saturday night after a right shoulder injury on a 14-yard reception. Three other Buffs receivers were injured in the game: speedster Jimmy Horn Jr.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Nussmeier throws late TD passes, No. 13 LSU rallies to beat No. 9 Ole Miss 29-26 in overtime
item.description: BATON ROUGE, La. (AP) — Garrett Nussmeier was in the midst of what the LSU quarterback considered one of the worst games of his career. His last two snaps changed everything.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pochettino wins US debut as Musah and Pepi score second-half goals in 2-0 victory over Panama
item.description: Mauricio Pochettino won his debut as U.S. coach, getting a 49th-minute goal from Yunus Musah off an assist from AC Milan teammate Christian Pulisic and a stoppage-time strike from Ricardo Pepi for a 2-0 win over Panama.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vertuno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Dylan Sampson has 1-yard TD run in OT to lift No. 8 Tennessee past Florida, 23-17
item.description: Dylan Sampson scored his third touchdown of the game on a 1-yard run in overtime to give No. 8 Tennessee a 23-17 victory over Florida on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Al Lesar, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: No. 4 Penn State rallies back to beat USC 33-30 in overtime on TE Tyler Warren's record day
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Penn State traveled about 2,500 miles across the continent on its first road trip in the new Big Ten. The Nittany Lions then spent most of Saturday playing from behind against Southern California.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Beck passes for 459 yards and 3 TDs as No. 5 Georgia holds off Van Buren, Mississippi State 41-31
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — Carson Beck didn't panic when No. 5 Georgia found second-half resistance from heavy underdog Mississippi State. Beck passed for a career-high 459 yards and three touchdowns and Georgia withstood Mississippi State's second-half comeback bid for a 41-31 win Saturday.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ewers returns as No. 1 Texas beats No. 18 Oklahoma 34-3 in 1st Red River Rivalry game as SEC members
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Quinn Ewers came back again for No. 1 Texas with another romp over Red River rival Oklahoma, this time in the Southeastern Conference.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Oregon receiver ejected for spitting on Ohio State player: 'Why even do that?'
item.description: Oregon wide receiver Traeshon Holden was ejected in the second quarter of a game Saturday against Ohio State for spitting on a Buckeyes player.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Vasily Espindola and the Redland Chargers take on the Fruita Cowboys
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—In a dramatic 10U football playoff game, the Redland Chargers overcame a 13-point deficit in the second quarter, despite losing their starting quarterback to injury.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Matt McCarty takes lead at Black Desert in his 2nd PGA Tour start
item.description: Matt McCarty took a two-stroke lead into the final round in his second PGA Tour start, shooting a 7-under 64 on Saturday in the inaugural Black Desert Championship.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Senga's comeback to continue with start for Mets in Game 1 of NLCS vs Dodgers
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Mets pitcher Kodai Senga will start Game 1 of the National League Championship Series against Jack Flaherty and the Los Angeles Dodgers on Sunday, continuing his comeback from injuries that have limited him to two starts this year.
item.dc:creator: JERRY BEACH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: BYU improves to 6-0 after trouncing Arizona, 41-19
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU football team continues to prove all the preseason prognosticators wrong. The #14 Cougars battered Arizona Saturday at LaVell Edwards Stadium to improve to 6-0 for the first time since 2020 with a dominating 41-19 victory.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Veteran Sharks defenseman recalls moment when he realized injury “was pretty bad”
item.description: San Jose Sharks' Marc-Edouard Vlasic said his upper-body injury is improving, hopes to return within a couple weeks
item.dc:creator: Curtis Pashelka, The Mercury News

item.title: Jets QB Aaron Rodgers is off the injury report and fine to play Monday night vs. Bills
item.description: FLORHAM PARK, N.J. (AP) — Aaron Rodgers is off the New York Jets' injury report and will be back under center Monday night against the Buffalo Bills. The quarterback was a full participant Saturday after being limited Thursday and Friday while dealing with a sprained ankle.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ole Miss responds to allegations of their players faking injuries ahead of big game against LSU
item.description: The Ole Miss Rebel's released a statement on Friday regarding the questions surrounding players faking injuries to slow an opposing team's momentum.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jets holdout sued for $1.6 million; allegedly failed to pay business partner, sent 'security' to scare him off
item.description: As he continues his bizarre holdout that has cost him nearly $9 million, Haason Reddick is being sued for $1.6 million after allegedly stiffing, and trying to scare off, a business partner.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patriots’ Robert Kraft says Jabrill Peppers is ‘gone’ if disturbing domestic violence allegations are true
item.description: New England Patriots owner Robert Kraft said this week that if the allegations against safety Jabrill Peppers are true, "he's gone.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Penn State makes its first west coast Big Ten trip to USC
item.description: UNIVERSITY PARK (Nittany Nation) -- It's not your granddaddy's Big Ten anymore and this week's conference lineup is the people's exhibit A. Minnesota heads to UCLA, Ohio State is at Oregon, and Penn State heads to USC. Three games that hardly feel like Big Ten conference play.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Clay, NewsNation

item.title: Betts and Ohtani help the Dodgers stay alive in NLDS with 8-0 win vs the Padres
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Mookie Betts homered for the second straight night, Shohei Ohtani hit an RBI single and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat Dylan Cease and the San Diego Padres 8-0 on Wednesday night to force a deciding Game 5 in their tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: BYU looks to pick up where it left off after bye week
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - It's not ideal to have a bye week while on a five-game winning streak, but #14 BYU needed the rest after getting off to a 5-0 start.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mets win, advance to NLCS for the first time since 2015
item.description: NEW YORK — Francisco Lindor hit a grand slam in the sixth inning, his latest clutch swing in an extraordinary season full of them, and the New York Mets reached the National League Championship Series with a 4-1 victory over the Philadelphia Phillies on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: PHOTOS: A recap of Padres Game 3 victory over Dodgers
item.description: Tuesday marked another victory for the San Diego Padres, with the home team beating the Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 in Game 3 of the National League Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Tatis homers again as the Padres beat the Dodgers 6-5 for a 2-1 NLDS lead
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Fernando Tatis Jr.'s towering two-run home run highlighted a six-run second inning, and the San Diego Padres held on to beat Shohei Ohtani and the rival Los Angeles Dodgers 6-5 on Tuesday night to take a 2-1 lead in a tense NL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: BERNIE WILSON, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Muggers ripped watch off Dodgers pitcher Walker Buehler's arm, police say
item.description:
Police in California say thieves surrounded Los Angeles Dodgers starting pitcher Walker Buehler last month and ripped a pricey watch off his arm.
Police say the victims were all targets of organized groups who steal high-end watches in large crowds during events.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Karl-Anthony Towns scores 10 points in abbreviated preseason debut with New York Knicks
item.description: Jalen Brunson thought twice about going 1-on-2 in transition, instead dribbled back outside and flipped the ball behind him to Karl-Anthony Towns, who made a 3-pointer with a defender in his face.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Kevin Yu birdies 18th twice and wins Sanderson Farms in playoff for first PGA Tour title
item.description: Kevin Yu made a 15-foot birdie on the 18th hole for a 5-under 67, and he birdied it again from 6 feet in a playoff to beat Beau Hossler and win the Sanderson Farms Championship on Sunday for his first PGA Tour title.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: NASCAR playoffs roll into Talladega as cloud of lawsuit hangs over sport
item.description: It's most fitting that NASCAR this weekend races at Talladega Superspeedway, the sight of one of the first major disputes between drivers and the top stock car series in the United States.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, NewsNation
